title: Data type parameter should be provided when using pandas.read_csv or pandas.read_table
description: This rule checks for the use of pandas.read_csv or pandas.read_table without a specified data type parameter.
message: Data type parameter should be provided when using pandas.read_csv or pandas.read_table
impact: Potential data type inconsistencies in the resulting DataFrame
recommendation: Always specify the data type parameter when using pandas.read_csv or pandas.read_table
why_is_this_an_issue: Using implicit data types can lead to data inconsistencies and errors in the resulting DataFrame.
how_to_fix: Always specify the data type parameter when using pandas.read_csv or pandas.read_table
